quality.rationale: 标准二维度规计算题，涉及联络与曲率张量的多步推导及平坦性结论

origin.question: Problem 9.5. Find the Christoffel symbols and Riemann curvature components for the two dimensional spacetime:$$\mathrm {d s}^{2} = \mathrm {d v}^{2} - \mathrm {v}^{2} \mathrm {d u}^{2}.$$
origin.solution: Solution 9.5. The only nonvanishing Christoffel symbols are $\Gamma_{\mathbf{uu}}^{\mathbf{v}} = \mathbf{v}$ and $\Gamma_{\mathbf{uv}}^{\mathbf{u}} = \Gamma_{\mathbf{vu}}^{\mathbf{u}} = \mathbf{v}^{-1}$ , so that$$\begin{array}{l}\mathsf {R}_{\mathsf {v u v u}} = \mathsf {R}_{\mathsf {u v u}}^{\mathsf {v}} = \Gamma_{\mathsf {u u}, \mathsf {v}}^{\mathsf {v}} - \Gamma_{\mathsf {v u}, \mathsf {u}}^{\mathsf {v}} + \Gamma_{\mathsf {v}\alpha}^{\mathsf {v}} \Gamma_{\mathsf {u u}}^{\alpha} - \Gamma_{\mathsf {u}\alpha}^{\mathsf {v}} \Gamma_{\mathsf {u v}}^{\alpha} \\= 1 - 0 + 0 - 1 = 0. \\\end{array}$$Since there is only one independent Riemann component in two dimensions we conclude that $\mathbf{R}_{\alpha \beta \gamma \delta} = 0$ , and the spacetime is flat. (This was also shown by a coordinate transformation in Problem 6.1.)
